name: Perpetuo
short_description: An apartment caught in a loop. A missing sister. A ritual gone wrong. Perpetuo is a first-person psychological horror game where each cycle changes the house, rewrites the story, and pushes you beyond the apartment into places that maybe shouldn’t exist.
detailed_description:
Imagine being trapped in an apartment where reality keeps shifting, where every loop takes you deeper into a mystery you don’t quite understand. At first, you think you’re searching for your missing sister… but the more you explore, the more you realize... nothing is what it seems.

Perpetuo is a first-person psychological horror game where you relive the same apartment over and over, but each time, the walls remember more than you do. The furniture moves, objects disappear, and something lurks in the dark—something that knows you’re here.

What to Expect:

  • A Shifting Nightmare: The apartment changes each loop, revealing new routes, rules, and threats.

  • Environmental Storytelling: Piece the story together from spaces, fragments, and subtle clues... no hand-holding.

  • Challenging Puzzles: Rituals and logic puzzles to unlock new areas and endings.

  • Unrelenting Tension: A shadowy entity watches, adapts, and grows less predictable the deeper you go.

  • A Focused Horror Experience: Short, tense, replayable... built for atmospheric exploration, puzzle solving, and the occasional sharp burst of action.

Face the cycle. Break the cycle. Or stay trapped forever in... Perpetuo.

supported_languages:
English*, German, Spanish - Spain, French, Italian, Turkish, Japanese, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
